titles.en: Chapter on Bequests Completing What is Deficient in Zakat

text: 5413 - رَوَى مَسْعَدَةُ بْنُ صَدَقَةَ اَلرَّبَعِيُّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلْوَصِيَّةُ تَمَامُ مَا نَقَصَ مِنَ اَلزَّكَاةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5413 - Masadah ibn Sadaqah Al-Rabii narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Making a will completes what is lacking from the payment of zakat."
